notes: BANNED in Saudi Arabia and Kuwait (GCC largest economies); Qatar = highly restricted; UAE (Dubai/Abu Dhabi tourist zones) = accessible but licensed venues only; Bahrain = accessible; Iran (not GCC but regional) = complete ban; exporting wine to KSA/Kuwait = impossible legally; significant market access barrier across GCC region; tourist resort exceptions in UAE/Bahrain growing

regulation_name: GSO 9 — Etiquetage Halal GCC (alcool exclu certification halal)
regulation_ref: Gulf Standard GSO 9 (Halal food certification) + GSO 2055 (Halal requirements)
key_requirements: GSO 9 and GSO 2055 define halal food standards across GCC; alcohol is inherently haram (forbidden) and therefore cannot carry halal certification; wine specifically excluded from halal product categories; where alcohol is tolerated (UAE, Bahrain, Qatar hotel exception), products must be clearly labelled as non-halal/alcohol-containing; GCC unified customs tariff classifies wine under Chapter 22; where permitted: labelling must comply with GSO 9 requirements for non-halal food products; Arabic language label mandatory in GCC states where wine permitted
notes: Halal certification for wine = impossible by definition; Arabic label mandatory where wine sales permitted; UAE requires bilingual labelling; age verification (21+ in UAE) required at point of sale; significant duty-free wine trade through Dubai airport/Bahrain

regulation_name: Excise alcool + Ministry of Health etiquetage + kashrut (Israel)
regulation_ref: Excise Law (Customs and Excise) + Public Health Ordinance + Ministry of Health regulations + Rabbinical Authority kashrut
enforcement_body: Israel Tax Authority (ITA) + Ministry of Health + Standards Institution of Israel
key_requirements: Israel: wine excise - still wine NIS 0-4/litre depending on alcohol content (relatively low); import duty varies by origin (zero under EU-Israel Association Agreement for EU wine); mandatory label: Hebrew required; country of origin; ABV; kosher certification (kashrut) important for large religious consumer segment - Rabbinical authority certification; kashrut for wine = strict (yayin nesech prohibition); Israeli wine production significant (Golan Heights, Galilee, Judean Hills); health warning on label recommended; Ministry of Health anti-alcohol campaigns; age verification 18+
notes: Kosher wine = major market segment in Israel and Jewish diaspora globally; Kosher wine certification (mashgiach supervision, mevushal/non-mevushal designation) mandatory for Orthodox market; Israeli wine industry growing quality reputation; Golan Heights wines available internationally; EU wine zero tariff under Association Agreement

regulation_name: Douanes egyptiennes + restrictions religieuses (alcool autorise non-Musulmans uniquement)
regulation_ref: Egyptian Customs Law No. 207/2020 + Food Safety Law + Ministerial Decrees on alcohol
enforcement_body: Egyptian Customs Authority + Egyptian Food Safety Authority (EFSA) + Ministry of Finance
key_requirements: Egypt: alcohol not prohibited by national civil law but culturally/religiously restricted; alcohol sold in licensed venues - hotels, tourist restaurants, duty-free, licensed supermarkets; Muslim-majority population (90%) = significant demand restriction; import customs duty on wine = 1200% (effectively prohibitive for standard wine); Al-Ahram Beverages Company (ABC) = dominant domestic producer (Obelisk wine, Sakkara beer); domestic wine production in Nile Delta; labels must include Arabic information; EFSA food safety standards; tourism zones (Sharm El Sheikh, Hurghada, Luxor) most accessible; Ramadan restrictions enforced
notes: Egypt 1200% import duty on wine = effectively prohibitive for imports; domestic wine market dominated by ABC (Obelisk, Grand Marquis brands); tourist zones = accessible but pricey; Ramadan restrictions on public alcohol consumption/visibility; Egyptian wine culture limited but exists among Coptic Christians and foreign residents

regulation_name: Loi 06-99 — Code des contributions indirectes (alcool Maroc)
regulation_ref: Loi n 06-99 sur la liberte des prix et de la concurrence + Code des contributions indirectes (Dahir 1-77-339)
enforcement_body: Direction Generale des Impots (DGI) + Direction Generale des Douanes + Ministere de la Sante
key_requirements: Morocco: wine production and consumption permitted but regulated; excise: TIC (Taxe Interieure de Consommation) on wine approx 1500 MAD/hl for wine max 15% ABV; import duty 25% + TVA 20%; wine may not be sold to Muslims (legal restriction - Dahir provision); wine sold to non-Muslims and tourists in licensed outlets; Morocco major wine producer (Meknes, Beni Mtir, Guerrouane, Boulaouane regions); wine export to EU market; Ramadan restrictions: alcohol sales prohibited/restricted publicly during Ramadan; ONSSA food safety authority controls
notes: Morocco = significant African wine producer; wine sold to non-Muslims only (legal prohibition on Muslim purchase); tourist areas (Marrakech riads, Casablanca restaurants) accessible; Ramadan complete public ban on alcohol display and sale in many areas; Moroccan wine exports to EU under AA/preferential tariff; wine production rooted in French colonial era (Gris de Boulaouane etc.)

regulation_name: Liquor Products Act 60/1989 + WOSA/SAWIS (Afrique du Sud)
regulation_ref: Liquor Products Act 60 of 1989 (as amended) + National Liquor Act 59 of 2003 + Liquor Act 27 of 1989
enforcement_body: DAFF (Department of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries) + SAWIS (South African Wine Industry Statistics) + WOSA (Wines of South Africa) + SARS
key_requirements: South Africa: Liquor Products Act 60/1989 defines wine, and regulates production and labelling; Wine of Origin (WO) system: legally demarcated Wine of Origin districts (Stellenbosch, Paarl, Franschhoek, Robertson, Swartland, Walker Bay etc.); WO seal on bottle (stripe): estate/origin/vineyard certification; mandatory declarations: WO designation, vintage, varietal (85%+ single variety); SAWIS administers WO certification; WOSA export promotion; excise duty: R4.35/litre still wine (2024/25 Budget); National Liquor Act controls manufacturing and distribution licences
notes: South Africa = world's 7th largest wine producer; Stellenbosch/Paarl premium; bulk wine export significant (UK, Netherlands); WO certification = credible GI system; SAWIS mandatory annual harvest declaration; WOSA promotes SA wine internationally; Black Economic Empowerment (BEE) requirements for liquor licences; alcohol harm reduction policy context (foetal alcohol syndrome = high prevalence in SA)

regulation_ref: NAFDAC Act (Cap N1 Laws of the Federation) + NAFDAC Regulations on Alcoholic Beverages + R 19-3-2019
enforcement_body: NAFDAC (National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control) + FIRS (Federal Inland Revenue Service)
key_requirements: Nigeria: NAFDAC registration mandatory for all imported and locally produced wine; Certificate of Registration required; labelling: product name, alcohol content, volume, manufacturer/importer, production and expiry dates, lot number, NAFDAC number on label; health warning mandatory; excise duty on wine: NGN 0.30/centilitre; import duty 20% + ETLS ECOWAS levy; wine market growing in Lagos, Abuja; Northern Nigerian states (12 states) apply Sharia - alcohol restricted/banned
notes: Nigeria wine market dominated by South African, French, Italian imports; NAFDAC registration = 3-6 month process; northern states (Kano, Kaduna, Sokoto etc.) = Sharia alcohol ban; Lagos/Abuja = accessible wine market; NAFDAC number must appear on label; counterfeiting of wine labels = significant issue

regulation_ref: Alcoholic Drinks Control Act No. 4 of 2010 + Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) standards + Customs and Excise Act
enforcement_body: Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) + KEBS + Alcoholic Drinks Control Board + County governments
key_requirements: Kenya: Alcoholic Drinks Control Act 2010 regulates wine production, import, distribution; licence required for import and sale; excise duty on wine: KSh 120/litre (Excise Duty Act 2015 + Finance Acts); import duty 25% (EAC CET) + VAT 16%; KEBS standard KS EAS 192 for wine quality; mandatory labelling: product name, alcohol content, volume, country of origin, importer, health warning; health warning mandatory; under-18 sale prohibited; restricted sale hours; county-level regulations additional layer
notes: Kenya wine market growing - Nairobi middle class; EAC common external tariff 25% on wine from outside EAC; South African wine growing market share (COMESA preferential); Kenyan wine production minimal; county governments (Nairobi, Mombasa) may have additional restrictions; tourism sector (safaris) = significant wine consumption segment

regulation_name: CAC/GL 41-2003 + Codex norme generale vin (Codex Alimentarius)
regulation_ref: CAC/GL 41-2003 (Guidelines organic wine) + CODEX STAN 1-1985 (general food labelling) + Codex MRL for wine
key_requirements: Codex does not have a specific mandatory wine standard but CAC/GL 41-2003 references organic wine; Codex General Standard for Labelling CODEX STAN 1-1985 applies to wine as a food product; Codex MRL standards for pesticide residues in wine grapes and wine; Codex standard for food additives (CODEX STAN 192-1995) applies to wine additives (sulfites, ascorbic acid, egg albumin etc.); Codex maximum levels for contaminants (lead, ochratoxin A in wine); Codex standards referenced by WTO-SPS Agreement as international standard baseline
notes: Codex standards = reference for WTO SPS disputes involving wine; OIV (International Organisation of Vine and Wine - not Codex) is primary international wine technical standard body; Codex MRL for wine grapes important for pesticide residue compliance; ochratoxin A Codex maximum level reference for wine import controls

regulation_name: ISO — Verrerie laboratoire + methodes analytiques vin

enforcement_body: ISO TC 48 (Laboratory glassware) + ISO TC 34 (Food products)
key_requirements: ISO 4796 covers laboratory glassware standards (used in wine analysis labs); primary international wine analytical methods body = OIV (International Organisation of Vine and Wine) - not ISO; OIV Compendium of International Methods of Wine and Must Analysis is primary reference; ISO 22000 (food safety management) applies to wine production facilities; ISO 14001 environmental management increasingly adopted by wine estates; ISO/IEC 17025 for wine analysis laboratory accreditation
notes: ISO not primary wine standard body - OIV is; ISO 4796 laboratory glassware only tangential; ISO 22000 FSMS increasingly required by major wine buyers (supermarkets); ISO 14001 for environmental management in wineries; ISO/IEC 17025 for wine analysis laboratory accreditation

regulation_ref: N/A - UNECE WP.29 scope limited to vehicle technical regulations
enforcement_body: UNECE WP.29 (World Forum for Harmonization of Vehicle Regulations)
key_requirements: UNECE WP.29 develops vehicle technical regulations and does not cover food or beverage products; wine as an alcoholic beverage is entirely outside UNECE WP.29 scope; UNECE standards for packaging (timber pallet ISPM 15) may apply to wine export packaging indirectly; no substantive UNECE regulatory obligation for wine as a product
notes: UNECE WP.29 = vehicle regulations only; not applicable to wine product; mentioned for completeness of international framework review; UNECE timber packaging ISPM 15 = relevant for wooden wine crate export

regulation_name: WADA — alcool interdit sports specifiques (tir arc, sports moteur)
regulation_ref: WADA Prohibited List 2024 - Section P1 (Alcohol prohibited in competition in specific sports)
enforcement_body: WADA (World Anti-Doping Agency) + International Federations (FITA archery, FIA motor sport, FAI air sports)
key_requirements: WADA Prohibited List 2024: alcohol is prohibited in-competition in specific sports only: archery (FITA), automobile (FIA), karate (WKF), motorcycling (FIM), powerboating (UIM), air sports (FAI); wine = alcoholic beverage; blood alcohol concentration (BAC) threshold for violation: typically more than 0.10 g/L in blood; wine consumption by athletes in these specific sports before/during competition = doping violation; for all other sports: alcohol not prohibited by WADA; note: WADA does not regulate wine as a product in commerce
notes: WADA alcohol prohibition applies only to specific sports federations; wine as commercial product NOT affected by WADA; wine consumed by athletes in non-restricted sports = no WADA issue; relevant only for wine marketing/sponsorship at archery/motorsport events; low relevance for wine regulatory compliance purposes

regulation_name: OECD — Non applicable (politiques economiques, pas reglementation produit vin)

enforcement_body: OECD Health Division + OECD Directorate for Employment, Labour and Social Affairs
key_requirements: OECD produces health policy research on alcohol harm and economic costs but does not create binding wine product regulations; OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises (2023) apply to wine producers' supply chain due diligence (human rights - vineyard worker conditions, environmental stewardship); OECD studies on alcohol taxation policy inform national excise decisions; OECD Harmful Tax Practices framework not applicable to wine excise; policy reference, not regulatory binding instrument
notes: OECD not applicable as binding wine regulation; OECD MNE Guidelines relevant for ESG/human rights compliance in vineyard operations; OECD policy research influences alcohol taxation policy in member countries; no OECD wine product standard exists

key_requirements: Code CIP-13 sur chaque présentation pour identification et traçabilité; inscription LPPR (Liste Produits et Prestations Remboursables) pour remboursement éventuel; prix administré si remboursé Sécu

regulation_name: Arzneimittelgesetz (AMG) — Loi allemande sur les médicaments
key_requirements: Zulassung (AMM) obligatoire auprès BfArM; étiquetage en allemand; Gebrauchsinformation (notice) en allemand; pharmacovigilance nationale; inspections GMP Länder; numéro Zulassung sur emballage
Paracétamol apothekenpflichtig (vente exclusive en pharmacie); boîtes max 10g; 20 comprimés 500mg max sans ordonnance; pas de vente en grande surface; sérialisation FMD obligatoire
notes: Contrôle strict accès paracétamol vs France/UK; motivé par prévention overdose

key_requirements: AIC (Autorizzazione all'Immissione in Commercio) obligatoire; étiquetage en italien; codice AIC sur emballage; notice en italien; pharmacovigilance nationale AIFA

regulation_name: AIFA — Statut OTC paracétamol Italie (classificazione SOP/OTC)
key_requirements: Paracétamol classé SOP (Senza Obbligo di Prescrizione) ou OTC avec logo automedication; Fascia C (non remboursé); publicité autorisée au grand public; logo triangulaire "farmaco senza ricetta"
notes: SOP = sans ordonnance mais pub limitée; OTC = publicité grand public autorisée

regulation_name: Real Decreto Legislativo 1/2015 — Garantías medicamentos Espagne
enforcement_body: AEMPS (Agencia Española de Medicamentos y Productos Sanitarios)
key_requirements: Autorización de comercialización AEMPS obligatoire; número de registro; étiquetage en espagnol; prospecto (notice); código nacional (CN) 7 chiffres; pharmacovigilance FEDRA; sérialisation FMD
Paracétamol classé EFP (Especialidad Farmacéutica Publicitaria) ou CSP; vente exclusive en pharmacie sauf dérogation; publicité grand public autorisée pour EFP; código nacional obligatoire

regulation_name: Geneesmiddelenwet — Loi néerlandaise sur les médicaments
key_requirements: Handelsvergunning (AMM) obligatoire; étiquetage en néerlandais; bijsluiter (notice) en néerlandais; numéro RVG/RVH; pharmacovigilance nationale; sérialisation FMD
Paracétamol classé UAD (Uitsluitend Apotheek en Drogist) pour dosages courants ou AV (Algemeen Verkrijgbaar) pour petits conditionnements; sérialisation FMD obligatoire

enforcement_body: MHRA (Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency)
key_requirements: Marketing Authorisation (MA) MHRA obligatoire; dossier CTD UK-specific; étiquetage en anglais GB; UK Responsible Person obligatoire; notice patient UK; Northern Ireland = EU rules (Windsor Framework)
notes: Post-Brexit Great Britain séparé UE; Northern Ireland reste sous EU pharma rules

regulation_name: MHRA — Falsified Medicines Scheme UK (UK FMD adapté)
regulation_ref: SI 2019/775 + MHRA guidance on UK FMD
key_requirements: Sérialisation UK: DataMatrix 2D + dispositif anti-effraction sur emballages; UK National Medicines Verification System (UK NMVS); obligations similaires EU FMD; paracétamol OTC soumis
notes: UK NMVS opérationnel post-Brexit; coexistence avec EU EMVS pour produits NI

key_requirements: Monographie BP Paracetamol: caractères; identification (IR/UV); impuretés (4-aminophénol limite stricte); dosage HPLC; comprimés; suspension orale; suppositoires; harmonisée Ph.Eur. 0049
notes: BP utilisée pour marché UK; post-Brexit indépendante de Ph.Eur. mais harmonisée en pratique

regulation_name: MHRA — Statut OTC paracétamol UK (GSL/P/POM classification)
key_requirements: Paracétamol classé GSL (General Sales List): max 16 comprimés 500mg en GMS; Pharmacy (P): max 32 comprimés; POM si formule spéciale; restriction stricte taille boîte GSL pour prévention overdose
notes: Politique UK overdose: limite 16 tabs GSL (supermarchés); 32 tabs pharmacie; réduit hospitalisations

regulation_name: Heilmittelgesetz (HMG) — Loi fédérale suisse sur les médicaments
key_requirements: Autorisation de mise sur le marché Swissmedic obligatoire; dossier CTD; étiquetage en 3 langues nationales (FR/DE/IT); notice trilingue; numéro Swissmedic; pharmacovigilance nationale

regulation_name: Swissmedic — Catégorisation OTC paracétamol Suisse (Cat. C/D)
regulation_ref: HMG Art. 23-26 + Ordonnance sur les médicaments (OMéd)
key_requirements: Paracétamol catégorie D (vente en droguerie sans conseil pharmacien obligatoire) ou C (pharmacie uniquement) selon dosage/forme; pas de sérialisation FMD CH; propre système traçabilité
notes: Catégorie D = drogueries autorisées; unique parmi pays européens

key_requirements: Ph.Helv. intègre les monographies Ph.Eur. dont Paracetamolum 0049; référence officielle qualité pour marché suisse; harmonisation ICH Q4B

regulation_name: Cadre EEE — Directive 2001/83/CE applicable en Norvège
key_requirements: AMM via procédure MRP/DCP ou nationale NoMA; étiquetage en norvégien; pharmacovigilance NoMA; sérialisation FMD applicable via accord EEE; CE marking reconnu
notes: Norvège = EEE non-UE; adopte législation pharma UE via accord EEE automatiquement

key_requirements: Paracétamol classé Reseptfritt (sans ordonnance) en pharmacie; conditionnements hors pharmacie limités (max 30 comprimés); sérialisation FMD appliquée; déclaration pharmacovigilance NoMA

regulation_name: Loi fédérale 61-FZ — Circulation des médicaments en Russie
enforcement_body: Roszdravnadzor (Federal Service for Surveillance in Healthcare)
key_requirements: Enregistrement d'État obligatoire (государственная регистрация); dossier en russe; numéro GR obligatoire sur emballage; étiquetage en russe; pharmacovigilance nationale Roszdravnadzor

regulation_name: Système de sérialisation MDLP — Track & Trace Russie
enforcement_body: Roszdravnadzor + CRPT (Centre National de Développement des Technologies Numériques)
key_requirements: Marquage DataMatrix obligatoire sur chaque boîte; enregistrement dans IS MDLP (мониторинг движения лекарственных препаратов); traçabilité fabricant-distributeur-pharmacie; obligatoire depuis 2020
notes: MDLP opérationnel; obligatoire pour tous médicaments vendus en Russie incluant paracétamol OTC

regulation_name: EAEU Decision 78 — Marché pharmaceutique commun EAEU
regulation_ref: EAEU Supreme Eurasian Economic Council Decision No. 78 (2016)
enforcement_body: EEC (Eurasian Economic Commission) + Autorités nationales (Roszdravnadzor/DKFP BY/MoH KZ etc.)
key_requirements: Enregistrement unifié EAEU valable RU/BY/KZ/AM/KG; dossier harmonisé EAEU CTD; GMP commun EAEU; certificat GMP EAEU obligatoire; procédures décentralisées ou centralisées; sérialisation MDLP applicables RU

regulation_name: Beşeri Tıbbi Ürünler Ruhsatlandırma Yönetmeliği — AMM Turquie
regulation_ref: Regulation on Licensing of Medicinal Products for Human Use (Official Gazette 2005/8599 + updates)
enforcement_body: TITCK (Türkiye İlaç ve Tıbbi Cihaz Kurumu)
key_requirements: Ruhsat (AMM) obligatoire auprès TITCK; dossier CTD en turc + anglais; étiquetage obligatoirement en turc; notice (kullanma talimatı) en turc; alignement progressif sur Ph.Eur.
notes: TITCK anciennement İEGM; réorganisé 2011; candidature UE suspendue mais alignement réglementaire maintenu

regulation_name: TITCK — Statut OTC paracétamol + sérialisation ITS Turquie
key_requirements: Paracétamol reçetesiz (sans ordonnance) en Turquie; sérialisation via ITS (İlaç Takip Sistemi) obligatoire; DataMatrix sur chaque boîte; traçabilité pharmacies; pharmacovigilance VigiBase TR
notes: ITS = système national de track & trace médicaments opérationnel depuis 2010; un des premiers mondiaux

regulation_name: Ukraine — Loi sur les médicaments + Centre d'Expertise d'État
regulation_ref: Law of Ukraine on Medicinal Products No. 123/96-ВР (as amended 2023)
enforcement_body: State Expert Centre of MoH Ukraine (Державний експертний центр МОЗ)
key_requirements: Enregistrement national obligatoire; certificat de qualité; étiquetage en ukrainien; notice en ukrainien; pharmacovigilance nationale; dossier CTD adapté; coopération EMA renforcée post-2022
notes: Contexte guerre: réglementations d'urgence applicables; cooperation EMA-Ukraine renforcée depuis 2022

regulation_name: FDA OTC Monograph 21 CFR 343 — Analgésique interne / antipyrétique
regulation_ref: 21 CFR Part 343 (Internal Analgesic, Antipyretic, and Antirheumatic Drug Products for OTC Human Use)
enforcement_body: FDA CDER — Office of Nonprescription Drug Products
key_requirements: Monograph OTC: paracétamol = active ingredient reconnu; dosage adulte 325-1000mg/prise, max 4g/j; formulations permises; labeling obligatoire (warnings hépatotoxicité, alcool); "Do not use with other acetaminophen products"; Drug Facts panel
notes: FDA OTC Monograph: commercialisation sans NDA si conformité; paracétamol = monograph ingredient established

regulation_name: FDA OTC Reform — CARES Act 2020 (OTC Monograph Reform)
enforcement_body: FDA CDER — Office of Nonprescription Drug Products
key_requirements: Réforme système monographs OTC: Administrative Orders (AO) remplacent rulemaking; OTC Drug Facility Fee (ODFAC) annuelle; SPL data standards pour OTC labeling; accélère modifications monograph
notes: CARES Act 2020 modernise le système OTC monograph vieux de 50 ans

regulation_name: DSCSA — Drug Supply Chain Security Act (Sérialisation US)
regulation_ref: DQSA 2013 Title II (DSCSA); 21 U.S.C. 360eee et seq.
key_requirements: Product Identifier (PI) = NDC + lot + expiration + numéro série; sérialisation 2D DataMatrix; vérification électronique interopérable; full interoperability depuis novembre 2023; saleable returns verification
notes: DSCSA interoperability pharmacies: calendrier repoussé; full compliance attendue 2025

key_requirements: Monographie USP Acetaminophen: identité (IR, HPLC); pureté (4-aminophénol < 0.001%; p-chloroacétanilide); dissolution; dosage HPLC; préparations officielles (tablettes IR/ER, suspension, suppositoires)
notes: Harmonisée ICH Q4B Annex 8 avec Ph.Eur. 0049 et JP; référence officielle FDA pour qualité OTC

regulation_name: FDA cGMP 21 CFR Part 211 — Current Good Manufacturing Practice
enforcement_body: FDA CDER / OPQ (Office of Pharmaceutical Quality)
key_requirements: cGMP: organisation et personnel; bâtiments et installations; équipements; contrôle production et procédés; laboratoires contrôle qualité; enregistrements; plaintes; retraits; inspection FDA; OTC pharma soumis comme prescription drugs

regulation_name: Proposition 65 — Safe Drinking Water and Toxic Enforcement Act CA
regulation_ref: California Health & Safety Code § 25249.5 et seq.
enforcement_body: California OEHHA (Office of Environmental Health Hazard Assessment)
key_requirements: Avertissement obligatoire si exposition à substances Prop 65; paracétamol lui-même non listé directement; vérifier excipients (colorants, plastifiants emballage); warning label si seuil dépassé
notes: Paracétamol non listé Prop 65 directement; vérifier excipients et packaging

key_requirements: Notification 60 jours avant augmentation prix > 16%; reporting annuel prix fabricant; drug pricing transparency pour producteurs OTC commercialisés en Californie

regulation_name: New York — Drug Take-Back Act (déchets médicaments)
enforcement_body: NY Department of Environmental Conservation + DEA
key_requirements: Programme collecte médicaments non utilisés obligatoire; fabricants OTC au-dessus seuil ventes NY financent stewardship program; disposal sécurisé paracétamol OTC usagé; collecte communautaire

regulation_name: Food and Drugs Act Canada — Médicaments non-prescription (OTC)
regulation_ref: Food and Drugs Act R.S.C. 1985 c. F-27 + Food and Drug Regulations C.08
enforcement_body: Health Canada — Health Products and Food Branch
key_requirements: DIN (Drug Identification Number) obligatoire; paracétamol = non-prescription drug; ANDS (Abbreviated New Drug Submission) ou NDS; Health Canada OTC Monograph Analgesic; renouvellement DIN si changement

regulation_name: Health Canada — DIN + Monograph OTC paracétamol Canada
regulation_ref: Health Canada OTC Monograph: Analgesics, Antipyretics + Food and Drug Regulations C.08.002
key_requirements: Dosage max 1000mg/dose, 4g/j adulte; étiquetage bilingue FR/EN obligatoire; Drug Facts box bilingue; DIN visible; mise en garde alcool et hépatotoxicité; posologie enfants selon poids
notes: Bilinguisme obligatoire (FR+EN) unique parmi grandes juridictions

regulation_name: Pharmacopée canadienne — USP-NF acceptée comme référence
regulation_ref: Health Canada reference: USP-NF accepted for Canadian market
key_requirements: USP-NF monograph Acetaminophen acceptée comme référence officielle au Canada; Ph.Eur. également acceptable si spécifications équivalentes; harmonisation ICH Q4B

regulation_name: Ley General de Salud Título XII + COFEPRIS — Registro sanitario
regulation_ref: Ley General de Salud Arts. 221-268; Reglamento de Insumos para la Salud (RIS)
enforcement_body: COFEPRIS (Comisión Federal para la Protección contra Riesgos Sanitarios) / CONAMER
key_requirements: Registro sanitario obligatoire; paracétamol = medicamento de libre venta (OTC) sin receta; dossier CTD adapté; étiquetage en espagnol; prospecto (notice) en espagnol; conditions de conservation
notes: COFEPRIS/CONAMER transition 2023; registro valide 5 ans renouvelable

key_requirements: Étiquetage: dénomination genérica (DCI); concentración; forma farmacéutica; número de registro sanitario; fabricant; país de fabricación; lote; caducidad; leyendas advertencia; "venta sin receta"

regulation_ref: RDC ANVISA No. 98/2016 (Medicamentos Isentos de Prescrição)
key_requirements: Registro ANVISA obligatoire; paracétamol = MIP (Medicamento Isento de Prescrição); dossier CTD adapté ANVISA; catégorie MIP sans ordonnance; renouvellement 5 ans; numéro ANVISA visible

Rotulagem obligatoire: número registro ANVISA; DCB (Denominação Comum Brasileira); concentração; forma farmacêutica; lote; validade; fabricante; "MEDICAMENTO ISENTO DE PRESCRIÇÃO"; pictogrammes MIP obligatoires
Monografia oficial Paracetamol FB6: identificação (IR); pureza (4-aminofenol); doseamento HPLC; formas farmacêuticas: comprimidos, xarope; harmonisation ICH Q4B partielle

regulation_name: Ley 16.463 + Disposición ANMAT — Registro medicamentos Argentine
enforcement_body: ANMAT (Administración Nacional de Medicamentos, Alimentos y Tecnología Médica)
key_requirements: Certificado de Autorización (CA) obligatoire; paracétamol = venta libre (OTC) en pharmacie Argentine; dossier CTD adapté; étiquetage en espagnol; prospecto en espagnol; renovación 5 ans

regulation_name: Decreto Supremo 3/2010 — Reglamento médicaments Chili + ISP
regulation_ref: Decreto Supremo No. 3/2010 (Reglamento de Productos Farmacéuticos)
enforcement_body: ISP (Instituto de Salud Pública de Chile)
key_requirements: Registro sanitario ISP obligatoire; paracétamol = medicamento de venta directa (sans ordonnance) clase C; dossier CTD; étiquetage en espagnol; inscripción PNAF; GMP certificate ISP

enforcement_body: INVIMA (Instituto Nacional de Vigilancia de Medicamentos y Alimentos)
key_requirements: Registro sanitario INVIMA obligatoire; paracétamol = venta sin fórmula médica; vigencia 10 ans; dossier CTD adapté; étiquetage en espagnol; normes analytiques ICONTEC/INVIMA

regulation_name: GMC Resolution 23/95 — Enregistrement harmonisé médicaments MERCOSUR
key_requirements: Cadre d'harmonisation enregistrement médicaments MERCOSUR (BR/AR/UY/PY); dossier harmonisé; reconnaissance mutuelle en développement; paracétamol soumis aux enregistrements nationaux membres
notes: Harmonisation partielle; enregistrements nationaux restent obligatoires en pratique

regulation_name: NMPA — Drug Administration Law 2019 + enregistrement médicament Chine
regulation_ref: Drug Administration Law (DAL) 2019 (药品管理法 2019 修订)
key_requirements: Enregistrement médicament (药品注册) obligatoire NMPA; MAH (Marketing Authorisation Holder) system; CTD dossier en chinois simplifié; GMP certificate NMPA; paracétamol = OTC Class B (乙类OTC — label vert)
notes: OTC Class B (绿色标签): vente en pharmacie ET drugstores certifiés (GSP)

enforcement_body: NMPA / NIFDC (National Institutes for Food and Drug Control)
key_requirements: ChP 2020 monographie Paracetamolum: identification; pH; impuretés (4-aminophénol); dosage HPLC; préparations officinales; harmonisation ICH Q4B partielle avec Ph.Eur./USP
notes: ChP 2020 harmonisée avec Ph.Eur./USP via ICH; NMPA adhère à ICH depuis 2017

regulation_name: NMPA — OTC Catalogue + étiquetage OTC Chine
regulation_ref: NMPA Administrative Measure on Classification and Management of OTC Drugs 2019
key_requirements: Catalogue OTC NMPA: paracétamol listé OTC Class B (乙类); étiquetage en chinois simplifié; symbole OTC vert; instructions: concentration, posologie, contre-indications; numéro approbation NMPA

regulation_name: Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance Cap. 138 Hong Kong
enforcement_body: Pharmacy and Poisons Board of Hong Kong (PPB HK)
key_requirements: Enregistrement obligatoire PPB HK; paracétamol = Part II Poison pour grands conditionnements; petits conditionnements exemptés selon Schedule 1 Poison Rules; vente en pharmacie enregistrée; étiquetage anglais/chinois
notes: HK: grands packs paracétamol = Part II (pharmacie); petits packs (≤10 tabs) = unscheduled

regulation_name: Pharmaceutical Affairs Act (PAA) Taiwan + TFDA licence
key_requirements: Licence obligatoire TFDA (藥品許可證); paracétamol = OTC (成藥 automedication ou 指示藥 pharmacist-advised) selon dosage; dossier CTD Taiwan; étiquetage en chinois traditionnel; notice en chinois
notes: 成藥 = automedication pleine; 指示藥 = conseil pharmacien requis selon dosage/forme

regulation_name: PMD Act (薬機法) — Pharmaceutical and Medical Device Act Japon
enforcement_body: PMDA (Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency) + MHLW
key_requirements: Marketing Approval (承認) obligatoire; MAH japonais obligatoire; dossier JCTD; paracétamol = OTC Class 2 (第2類医薬品); renouvellement approbation 6 ans; pharmacovigilance PMDA
notes: OTC Class 2: vente en pharmacie (yakkyoku) ou magasin agréé (登録販売者 registered seller)

key_requirements: JP 18 monographie Acetaminophen: identité (IR, UV); impuretés (4-aminophénol 0.001% max); dosage potentiométrique + HPLC; harmonisation ICH Q4B Annex 8 (JP/Ph.Eur./USP)
notes: JP harmonisée ICH Annex 8; monographies JP/Ph.Eur./USP mutuellement reconnues

key_requirements: OTC Class 2 (第2類) pour paracétamol standard: conseils pharmacien recommandés; étiquetage mode emploi en japonais obligatoire; risques; contre-indications; vente internet autorisée sous conditions
notes: Classe 1 = conseil pharmacien obligatoire; Classe 3 = vente libre; paracétamol standard = Classe 2

regulation_name: Pharmaceutical Affairs Act Corée + MFDS — AMM médicament
regulation_ref: Pharmaceutical Affairs Act (약사법) Korea + MFDS Notices and Guidelines
enforcement_body: MFDS (Ministry of Food and Drug Safety — 식품의약품안전처)
key_requirements: Marketing Authorisation obligatoire MFDS; paracétamol = 일반의약품 (General Drug = OTC); dossier CTD coréen; étiquetage en coréen; Korean Pharmacopoeia référence analytique; pharmacovigilance nationale
Monographie KP Acetaminophen: identification; impuretés; dosage HPLC; harmonisation ICH Q4B partielle Ph.Eur./USP

regulation_name: Health Products Act + Medicines Act Singapour — Enregistrement OTC
key_requirements: Product licence HSA obligatoire; paracétamol = OTC (Pharmacy Only P ou General Sales GSL selon pack); dossier ACTD (ASEAN CTD); étiquetage en anglais; pharmacovigilance PRISM HSA; GMP PIC/S certificate

regulation_name: HSA — Therapeutic Product Registration + ACTD Singapore
regulation_ref: HSA Guidance on Therapeutic Products Registration (HSA-TP-GDS001)
key_requirements: Dossier ACTD format ASEAN accepté; HSA accepte FDA/TGA/EMA approval comme bridging evidence; paracétamol 500mg comprimés = GSL ou P selon taille conditionnement
notes: Singapore HSA one of fastest TPR pathways in ASEAN

regulation_name: DCA Malaysia — Drug Control Authority + Sale of Drugs Act 1952
regulation_ref: Control of Drugs and Cosmetics Regulations 1984 + Sale of Drugs Act 1952
enforcement_body: NPRA (National Pharmaceutical Regulatory Agency) / DCA Malaysia
key_requirements: Enregistrement produit obligatoire NPRA; paracétamol = OTC (Kumpulan Tiada Racun — General Sale); dossier ACTD; étiquetage en Bahasa Malaysia + anglais; GMP certificate PIC/S; pharmacovigilance MedWatch MY

regulation_name: Thai FDA — Drug Act B.E. 2510 (1967) Thaïlande
enforcement_body: FDA Thailand (Thai FDA) / Department of Medical Sciences
key_requirements: Enregistrement médicament Thai FDA obligatoire; paracétamol = ยาอันตราย (dangerous drug class) 500mg mais OTC en pratique; petits conditionnements = ยาสามัญประจำบ้าน (household remedy); dossier ACTD; étiquetage en thaï
notes: Paradoxe TH: paracétamol 500mg = "dangerous drug" mais OTC en pharmacie; classification stricte

regulation_name: Pharmaceutical Law 2016 — DAV Vietnam — Enregistrement médicament
enforcement_body: DAV (Drug Administration of Vietnam) — Ministry of Health
key_requirements: Số đăng ký (numéro enregistrement) obligatoire; dossier ACTD format; étiquetage en vietnamien obligatoire; paracétamol = thuốc không kê đơn (OTC); renouvellement 5 ans; GMP WHO certificate

regulation_ref: Law No. 36/2009 on Health + BPOM Regulation (Peraturan BPOM No. 14/2021)
key_requirements: Registrasi obat obligatoire BPOM; paracétamol = Obat Bebas (OTC — logo cercle vert) ou Obat Bebas Terbatas (logo bleu) selon dosage; dossier ACTD; étiquetage Bahasa Indonesia; GMP CPOB certificate
notes: Obat Bebas = OTC plein (cercle vert); Obat Bebas Terbatas = OTC limité (cercle bleu) selon dosage

regulation_name: FDA Philippines — RA 9711 (FDA Act 2009) — CPR médicament OTC
regulation_ref: Republic Act No. 9711 (FDA Act 2009) + FDA-PH AO No. 2016-0011
key_requirements: CPR (Certificate of Product Registration) obligatoire; paracétamol = OTC (non-prescription, Category I); dossier ACTD; étiquetage en anglais + philippin; GMP certificate; stability data; shelf-life validation

regulation_name: Drugs and Cosmetics Act 1940 + CDSCO — Schedule K OTC Inde
regulation_ref: Drugs and Cosmetics Act 1940 + Drugs Rules 1945 + Schedule K
enforcement_body: CDSCO (Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation) + DCG(I) (Drug Controller General of India)
key_requirements: Registration Certificate (RC) obligatoire pour médicaments importés; paracétamol = OTC Schedule K (vente sans ordonnance); étiquetage en anglais + langue locale si applicable; Indian Pharmacopoeia standards; Form 40/41
notes: Paracétamol non soumis à prescription Inde; vente libre pharmacies et certains commerces Schedule K

key_requirements: IP 2022 monographie Paracetamol: identification; impuretés (p-aminophénol < 0.005%); dosage HPLC; préparations IP; harmonisation ICH Q4B partielle
notes: IP référence officielle CDSCO; harmonisée partiellement avec Ph.Eur./USP

regulation_name: TGA — Therapeutic Goods Act 1989 + ARTG Registration Australie
key_requirements: ARTG registration obligatoire (AUST R pour registered medicine ou AUST L pour listed); paracétamol 500mg comprimés = AUST R; dossier CTD; cGMP PIC/S standards; PI (Product Information) + CMI (Consumer Medicine Information) obligatoires
notes: AUST R = registered (paracétamol standard); AUST L = listed (formulations faible risque)

regulation_name: SUSMP — Standard Uniform Scheduling Medicines & Poisons Australie
regulation_ref: Standard for the Uniform Scheduling of Medicines and Poisons (Poisons Standard 2024)
key_requirements: Scheduling: paracétamol S2 (Pharmacy Medicine) pour formulations courantes; Unscheduled (S0) pour petits packs ≤500mg ≤50 unités; S4 (prescription) si formulation codéinée > seuil; vente GMS pour packs S0
notes: S2 = pharmacie uniquement; S0 (Unscheduled) = supermarchés pour petits formats OTC

regulation_name: Medicines Act 1981 + Medsafe — Enregistrement médicaments Nouvelle-Zélande
enforcement_body: Medsafe (NZ Medicines and Medical Devices Safety Authority)
key_requirements: Consent to distribute Medsafe obligatoire; paracétamol = General Sale Medicine (GSM) ou Pharmacy-Only selon conditionnement; Trans-Tasman joint review avec TGA; étiquetage en anglais; pharmacovigilance CARM
notes: NZ accepte TGA approval (Trans-Tasman Mutual Recognition); paracétamol GSM = vente GMS

regulation_name: ASEAN PPWG — ACTD + AHWP harmonisation dossiers pharma
regulation_ref: ASEAN Common Technical Documents (ACTD) + ASEAN Harmonized Technical Requirements (AHTR)
enforcement_body: ASEAN Pharmaceutical Product Working Group (PPWG) + autorités nationales membres
key_requirements: Format ACTD commun pour enregistrement pays ASEAN; référence harmonisation; Work Sharing Initiative ASEAN; paracétamol OTC soumis aux enregistrements nationaux sur base ACTD
notes: ACTD = format dossier technique harmonisé ASEAN; enregistrements nationaux restent obligatoires

regulation_name: SFDA Saudi Arabia + GCC Drug Council — Enregistrement médicaments
regulation_ref: GCC Drug Registration System + SFDA Regulation (Pharmaceutical Affairs)
enforcement_body: SFDA (Saudi Food and Drug Authority) + GCC Drug Council members
key_requirements: Enregistrement SFDA obligatoire pour Arabie Saoudite; GCC Drug Registration System (GCCDS) pour extension UAE/KW/BH/QA/OM; paracétamol = OTC (sans prescription) GCC; dossier CTD; étiquetage arabe obligatoire; max 500mg/comprimé OTC
notes: SFDA: paracétamol OTC max 500mg/cp, 4g/j; Arabic mandatory on all labeling GCC

regulation_name: GSO — Normes pharmaceutiques GCC (Gulf Standardization Organisation)
key_requirements: Standards GSO pour qualité médicaments zone GCC; Ph.Eur./BP/USP acceptées comme références pharmacopées; GMP selon PIC/S ou WHO GMP acceptés; certificats d'analyse obligatoires

regulation_name: Pharmacist Ordinance Israel + Registre médicaments + Israeli Pharmacopoeia
regulation_ref: Pharmacists Ordinance 1981 (New Version) + Health Ministry Regulations
enforcement_body: Ministry of Health Israel — Pharmaceutical Administration (IMOH)
key_requirements: Enregistrement médicament (רישום תרופה) obligatoire MOH Israël; paracétamol = OTC sans ordonnance (ללא מרשם) en pharmacie; dossier CTD; étiquetage en hébreu (arabe si applicable); Israeli Pharmacopoeia accepte Ph.Eur./BP/USP

regulation_name: EDA — Egyptian Drug Authority — Enregistrement médicaments Égypte
key_requirements: Enregistrement obligatoire EDA; paracétamol = OTC (دون وصفة طبية — sans prescription); dossier CTD adapté EDA; étiquetage en arabe obligatoire; prix contrôlé MoH; GMP certificate; renouvellement périodique
notes: EDA créée 2019 remplace Egyptian Drug Organization (EDO); prix paracétamol réglementé Égypte

regulation_name: DMP Maroc — Autorisation de mise sur le marché médicaments
regulation_ref: Loi 17-04 portant code du médicament et de la pharmacie + décrets d'application
enforcement_body: DMP (Direction du Médicament et de la Pharmacie) — Ministère de la Santé Maroc
key_requirements: AMM marocaine obligatoire; paracétamol = médicament-conseil (sans ordonnance) en pharmacie; dossier CTD en français/arabe; étiquetage FR + arabe; prix homologué par commission nationale prix médicaments

regulation_name: SAHPRA — Medicines and Related Substances Act 101/1965 Afrique du Sud
regulation_ref: Medicines and Related Substances Act No. 101 of 1965 (amended Act 14/2015)
enforcement_body: SAHPRA (South African Health Products Regulatory Authority)
key_requirements: Registration certificate SAHPRA obligatoire; paracétamol = Schedule 0 (OTC, vente libre) ou Schedule 1 (pharmacie) selon conditionnement; dossier CTD; étiquetage en anglais; GMP PIC/S certificate
notes: SAHPRA opérationnel depuis 2018 (remplace MCC); Schedule 0 = vente libre pharmacies et GMS

regulation_name: NAFDAC Nigeria — Drug & Related Products Act 2004
regulation_ref: NAFDAC Act Cap N1 LFN 2004; Foods, Drugs and Related Products Registration Act
enforcement_body: NAFDAC (National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control Nigeria)
key_requirements: Enregistrement NAFDAC obligatoire; paracétamol = OTC (non-prescription) Nigeria; numéro NAFDAC visible sur packaging; étiquetage en anglais; GMP audit NAFDAC (WHO GMP); renouvellement 5 ans

regulation_name: Pharmacy and Poisons Board Kenya + EAC PMHRP — Enregistrement médicament
regulation_ref: Pharmacy and Poisons Act (Cap 244 Kenya) + EAC PMHRP framework
key_requirements: Enregistrement PPB obligatoire; paracétamol = General Sale Medicine (vente libre) Kenya; dossier CTD; étiquetage en anglais; EAC harmonisation PMHRP en cours (KE/TZ/UG/RW); GMP WHO standards
notes: EAC PMHRP: harmonisation enregistrement médicaments Afrique de l'Est en cours

regulation_name: ICH Guidelines (Q/E/S/M) — Standards harmonisés pharma globaux
enforcement_body: ICH (International Council for Harmonisation of Technical Requirements for Pharmaceuticals)
key_requirements: ICH Q6A (specifications); Q1A (stability); Q2(R2) (analytical validation); Q3A/B (impurities); Q8/9/10 (pharmaceutical development/risk/quality); M4 (CTD format); adopted by FDA/EMA/PMDA/Health Canada/NMPA + 30+ authorities; Annex 8 harmonise monographies Ph.Eur./USP/JP
notes: ICH Annex 8 harmonise monographies USP/Ph.Eur./JP pour paracétamol (Acetaminophen 0049)

key_requirements: WHO PQ pour paracétamol OTC destiné marchés LMIC (pays à revenus faibles/moyens); certification GMP + contrôle qualité WHO; liste OMS médicaments essentiels inclut paracétamol; procurement UNICEF/Gavi
notes: WHO PQ essentiel pour accès marchés Afrique subsaharienne; procurement UNICEF/Gavi utilise WHO PQ

regulation_ref: WADA Prohibited List International Standard 2024 (effective 1 January 2024)
key_requirements: Paracétamol non inscrit sur Liste des interdictions WADA 2024; aucune restriction pour sportifs; usage libre en compétition et hors compétition; était en monitoring 2018-2020 puis retiré
notes: Non prohibé; anciennement en monitoring 2018-2020 puis retiré

regulation_name: Codex Alimentarius — Non applicable aux médicaments OTC
regulation_ref: Codex Alimentarius Commission — N/A pour médicaments
key_requirements: Codex Alimentarius couvre normes sécurité alimentaire; médicaments OTC comme paracétamol ne relèvent pas du cadre Codex mais de la réglementation pharmaceutique nationale et des pharmacopées officielles
notes: Non applicable; cadre alimentaire et compléments alimentaires, pas pharmaceutique OTC

regulation_name: UNECE WP.29 — Non applicable aux médicaments OTC
enforcement_body: UNECE WP.29 (World Forum for Harmonization of Vehicle Regulations)
key_requirements: UNECE WP.29 régit les réglementations de sécurité des véhicules à roues; non applicable aux médicaments OTC comme le paracétamol
notes: Non applicable

regulation_name: OECD — Guidelines sécurité substances chimiques et GLP (référence)
regulation_ref: OECD Test Guidelines (TG) + OECD Principles of GLP (ENV/MC/CHEM(98)17)
enforcement_body: OECD (Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development)
key_requirements: OECD Test Guidelines utilisées pour études toxicologiques paracétamol; OECD GLP principles pour études non-cliniques; mutuellement reconnues FDA/EMA/PMDA; soft law
notes: OECD GLP = référence études tox non-cliniques; OECD TG = protocoles études sécurité substance

enforcement_body: EC DG GROW + National Market Surveillance Authorities
key_requirements: Mandatory A-G grading for fuel efficiency, wet grip, external rolling noise; QR code from 2024; EPREL database registration; label on tyre and point-of-sale display
notes: Replaces Reg 1222/2009; new classes from May 2021; noise measured per UN ECE R117

regulation_name: ECE Regulation No. 30 — Passenger Car Tyres Type Approval
enforcement_body: UNECE WP.29 + National Type Approval Authorities (TAs)
key_requirements: Type approval for pneumatic tyres for passenger cars; E-mark (e.g. E11 for UK); dimensional standards; load/speed rating; marking requirements; DOT analogue
notes: Via Geneva 1958 Agreement; mandatory for EU market access; E-mark on sidewall

regulation_name: ECE Regulation No. 117 — Rolling Resistance + Wet Grip + Rolling Sound
key_requirements: Performance thresholds for rolling resistance coefficient (RRC), wet grip index (G), pass-by noise; type approval required; links to Reg 2020/740 label classes
notes: Test method per ISO 28580 for RRC; G-index per ISO 15222

regulation_name: REACH Annex XVII Entry 50 — PAH in Tyres
key_requirements: Restriction on 8 polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAHs) in rubber extender oils used in tyre manufacture; total PAH le 1 mg/kg per substance
notes: Applies to tyres placed on EU market regardless of origin; customs checks at borders

enforcement_body: ECHA Risk Assessment Committee + Member States
key_requirements: 6PPD and its quinone oxidation product (6PPD-Q) acutely toxic to coho salmon; ECHA preparing restriction under REACH Art.69; industry consultation 2025; likely ban or limit in EU tyres
notes: CA already banned 6PPD-Q 2024; EU restriction expected 2026-2027; monitor ECHA registry

regulation_name: ELV Directive — End-of-Life Vehicles (tyres as components)
enforcement_body: EC DG ENV + Member State authorities
key_requirements: Tyres as vehicle components subject to ELV; reuse/recycling targets; ban on hazardous substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr VI) in tyres; takeback obligation for used tyres
notes: Tyre manufacturers part of ELV extended producer responsibility chain

enforcement_body: EC DG ENV + Member State waste authorities
key_requirements: Used tyres classified as non-hazardous waste; hierarchy: prevention > reuse (retreading) > recycling > recovery; ban on landfill of whole and shredded tyres (Dir 1999/31/EC)
notes: Landfill ban since 2006 for whole tyres, 2003 for shredded; retreading preferred path

regulation_name: CSDDD — Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence (rubber supply chain)
enforcement_body: EC DG JUST + Member State supervisory authorities
key_requirements: Large tyre companies must conduct supply chain due diligence for natural rubber (deforestation, forced labour, biodiversity); applies to companies >1000 employees and >450M EUR turnover; tyre sector identified as high-risk for deforestation
notes: Phased entry 2027-2029; tyre industry natural rubber = key scope item; links EUDR Reg 2023/1115

regulation_name: ECE Regulation No. 109 — Retreaded Tyres (commercial vehicles)
key_requirements: Type approval for retreaded tyres; quality standards for retreading process; E-mark required; casing condition assessment; speed/load rating maintenance
notes: Applies commercially retreaded tyres; passenger car retreads less common but covered

regulation_name: REP Pneus — Filiere Responsabilite Elargie Producteur pneus
regulation_ref: Code de l'Environnement L.541-10 + Decret 2012-1456 modifie 2021
key_requirements: Producteurs/importateurs de pneus neufs doivent adherer a eco-organisme agree (Aliapur) ou creer systeme individuel; collecte et recyclage pneus uses; eco-contribution sur pneu neuf; tracabilite des flux
notes: Aliapur collecte >95% pneus uses FR; SVI Recylib alternative; contribution ~3-5 EUR/pneu

regulation_name: Loi AGEC — Tracabilite et information consommateur pneus
key_requirements: Information consommateur sur duree de vie; resistance au roulement; incitations a pneumatiques basse consommation; interdiction publicite mensongere sur performance ecologique pneus
notes: Art. L.541-9-1 Code Env; information sur etiquette EU 2020/740 obligatoire en FR

key_requirements: Mandatory take-back of used tyres by dealers; ARN (Altreifen Recycling Netz) as industry scheme; documentation requirements; ban on landfill
notes: Complements EU WFD; ARN handles ~97% of waste tyre volume in DE; 4 tyres per set rule

key_requirements: Framework recycling law; tyre manufacturers registered as waste producers; waste hierarchy obligations; traceability for tyre waste streams
notes: Implements EU WFD; tyres registered in Marktstammdatenregister for waste producers

regulation_name: DM 82/2011 — Gestione pneumatici fuori uso (PFU) via Ecopneus
key_requirements: Produttori/importatori di pneumatici nuovi obbligati a adesione Ecopneus o sistema individuale; raccolta PFU; eco-contributo per finanziamento filiera; rendicontazione annuale MASE
notes: Ecopneus collects ~97% Italian waste tyres; eco-fee ~2-4 EUR/tyre; PFU = pneumatici fuori uso

regulation_name: RD 1619/2005 — Gestion neumaticos fuera de uso (NFU) via SIGNUS
enforcement_body: Ministerio para la Transicion Ecologica + SIGNUS Ecovalor
key_requirements: Productores e importadores de neumaticos obligados a adhesion SIGNUS o sistema individual; recogida NFU; eco-contribucion financiando red recogida; metas reciclaje anuales
notes: SIGNUS gestiona >90% NFU en Espana; eco-tasa ~2-5 EUR por neumatico

key_requirements: Producentenverantwoordelijkheid voor autobanden; RecyBEM organiseert inzameling en verwerking; meldplicht voor importeurs; vergoeding per band; verwijderingsbijdrage inbegrepen in prijs
notes: RecyBEM verwerkt ~100% afgedankte autobanden NL; bijdrage ~2-4 EUR/band; linked to EU WFD

enforcement_body: DVSA (Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency) + OPSS
key_requirements: Construction, use and marking of tyres for passenger cars on UK roads; tread depth minimum 1.6mm; speed/load marking; E-mark or UK-mark (post-Brexit) required
notes: Post-Brexit: UKCA mark or retained E-mark accepted; enforcement by DVSA roadside checks

regulation_name: UK Retained ECE R30 + ECE R117 (post-Brexit type approval)
regulation_ref: UK Retained ECE Regulations — Vehicle Certification Agency (VCA)
key_requirements: UK retains ECE R30 and R117 as basis for tyre type approval; UK-mark (UKCA) or E-mark both accepted; GB-only market may diverge post-2025
notes: GB may diverge from EU regs post Retained EU Law Act; monitor VCA updates

regulation_name: UK Waste Tyre Producer Responsibility Regulations 2003
regulation_ref: The Waste Management (Miscellaneous Provisions) Regulations 2003 + Environmental Protection Act 1990
key_requirements: Take-back obligation for retailers and distributors; used tyres classified controlled waste; duty of care documentation; ban on landfill disposal of whole/shredded tyres
notes: No UK producer responsibility scheme equivalent to EU REP post-Brexit; EA enforcement

regulation_name: Swiss Road Traffic Ordinance (VTS) — Tyre Requirements
regulation_ref: VTS SR 741.41 (Verordnung ueber die technischen Anforderungen an Strassenfahrzeuge)
key_requirements: ECE R30 and R117 type approval required for Swiss market; Swiss tyre labelling aligned with EU Reg 2020/740; E-mark accepted; ASTRA national registration for aftermarket tyres
notes: CH aligns with EU/UNECE standards; bilateral CH-EU transport agreements apply

regulation_name: Norwegian EEA — EU Tyre Framework (ECE R30/R117 + Reg 2020/740)
regulation_ref: EEA Agreement Annex II + Norwegian Regulations on Tyres
enforcement_body: Statens vegvesen (Norwegian Public Roads Administration) + Miljoedirektoratet
key_requirements: Full EEA transposition of EU tyre labelling Reg 2020/740; ECE R30/R117 type approval; additional winter tyre requirements (studded/non-studded season rules); waste tyre regulations
notes: NO mandates winter tyres Nov-Apr; studded tyres urban restrictions; special NO rules layered on EU base

regulation_name: TR TS 018/2011 — Safety of Wheeled Vehicles (tyres scope)
regulation_ref: Technical Regulation of Customs Union TR TS 018/2011
key_requirements: EAEU technical regulation for wheeled vehicles including tyres; mandatory certification EAC mark; type approval via NAMI or accredited labs; marking requirements on sidewall
notes: EAC = Eurasian Conformity mark; mandatory for RU/BY/KZ/AM/KG markets

regulation_name: TR TS 018/2011 + TR CU 028/2011 — EAEU Tyre Technical Regulations
regulation_ref: TR TS 018/2011 (Wheeled Vehicles) + TR CU 028/2011 (Safety of Wheels and Tyres)
key_requirements: TR CU 028/2011 specifically covers wheels and tyres safety: dimensional marking, speed/load index, structural integrity; EAC certification mandatory; test protocols harmonized with ECE/ISO
notes: Applies across all 5 EAEU members; EEC manages technical regulation updates

regulation_name: Lastik Yoenetmeligi — Turkish Tyre Type Approval (ECE-aligned)
key_requirements: ECE R30 and R117 type approval mandatory for Turkish market; E-mark or Turkish equivalence accepted; TS EN ISO marking standards; homologation via TSE or TURKTOB
notes: TR is UNECE contracting party; ECE R30/R117 directly applicable; TSE homologation required

regulation_name: Cevre Kanunu — Turkish Waste Tyre REP
regulation_ref: Cevre Kanunu No.2872 + Atik Lastik Yoenetim Yoenetmeligi (2009 amended)
enforcement_body: Cevre ve Sehircilik Bakanligi (Ministry of Environment)
key_requirements: Extended producer responsibility for waste tyres; producers and importers register with ministry; take-back obligation; processing through licensed facilities; eco-contribution system
notes: LASDER (tyre industry association) coordinates collection; ~400K tonnes/year waste tyres in TR

regulation_ref: Resolution of CMU No.459 of 13 May 2020
enforcement_body: Ministry of Infrastructure Ukraine + State Service of Ukraine on Transport Safety
key_requirements: Technical regulation transposing EU/ECE tyre framework; ECE R30 and R117 type approval; mandatory certification; marking requirements; alignment with EU Reg 2020/740 labelling intent
notes: UA EU-association agreement drives alignment; enforcement disrupted since 2022 conflict

key_requirements: Minimum performance standards for new pneumatic tyres for passenger cars; endurance and strength tests; dimensional standards; sidewall marking requirements; DOT TIN code mandatory
notes: Mandatory for all passenger car tyres sold in US; self-certification by manufacturer; NHTSA random audit

key_requirements: Performance standards for LT tyres; high-speed test, endurance test, low inflation pressure performance; phased-in replacement of FMVSS 109 for new designs; uniform tyre quality grading (UTQG)
notes: FMVSS 139 applies to new passenger car and LT tyres manufactured after 2007 compliance dates

key_requirements: Mandatory UTQG label: treadwear, traction grade (AA/A/B/C), temperature grade (A/B/C); testing per FMVSS 109 Annex; label on tyre and vehicle sticker; consumer information focus
notes: UTQG different from EU label; treadwear grade comparative not absolute

regulation_name: TREAD Act — Transportation Recall Enhancement Accountability and Documentation
key_requirements: Mandatory reporting of tyre defects and safety-related issues; early warning reporting (EWR) for manufacturers; recall authority for defective tyres; TIN tracking enables targeted recall
notes: TREAD Act triggered by Firestone recall 2000; EWR quarterly reporting; 10-year TIN record retention

regulation_name: DOT TIN Code Marking — Tyre Identification Number
key_requirements: Each tyre must have unique DOT Tyre Identification Number (TIN) on sidewall; 13-character code includes plant code + size code + DOT symbol + date code; registration with NHTSA; enables recall traceability
notes: TIN mandatory on all tyres sold in US; plant code assigned by NHTSA; critical for TREAD Act EWR

regulation_name: CARB/DTSC 6PPD Priority Product — California Safer Consumer Products
regulation_ref: DTSC Priority Products List — 6PPD in Tyres (SCP Regulations 22 CCR Section 69501 et seq.)
enforcement_body: DTSC (Department of Toxic Substances Control) + CARB (California Air Resources Board)
key_requirements: 6PPD (antiozonant in tyres) listed as Priority Product under CA Safer Consumer Products; manufacturers must conduct Alternatives Analysis; DTSC may mandate reformulation or use restriction; 6PPD-Q lethal to coho salmon in stormwater
notes: CA SCP 2024 listing; global impact — major manufacturers reformulating worldwide; alternatives scarce

regulation_name: Carl Moyer Program — Low Rolling Resistance Tyre Incentives
regulation_ref: California Health and Safety Code Section 44275 et seq.
key_requirements: Incentive program promoting low rolling resistance tyres to reduce fuel consumption and GHG emissions; rebates for fleet vehicles using LRR tyres; links to CA low-carbon transport policy
notes: Voluntary incentive; relevant for fleet operators; LRR tyre = fuel efficiency label A/B equivalent

regulation_name: New York State Waste Tyre Fee
regulation_ref: NYS Environmental Conservation Law Article 27 Title 19
key_requirements: Retail fee of $2.50 per new tyre sold in NY; funds waste tyre collection and cleanup program; dealers register with DEC; fee visible on invoice; used tyre disposal regulated
notes: Fee enables NY waste tyre remediation; ~11M tyres/year in NY; free drop-off for consumers

regulation_name: Motor Vehicle Safety Act + CMVSS 109 + CMVSS 117
regulation_ref: Canada Motor Vehicle Safety Act RSC 1985 c.M-10.01 + CMVSS Standards 109 and 117
key_requirements: CMVSS 109 mirrors FMVSS 109 performance requirements; CMVSS 117 covers retreaded tyres; mandatory safety mark (CSA or TC); marking on sidewall including load/speed rating; Transport Canada random testing
notes: Canada harmonized with US FMVSS; TC approval needed; import declaration for tyres

regulation_ref: Ministerial Order under Canadian Environmental Protection Act 1999 (CEPA) — 6PPD-Q 2024
key_requirements: Canada first jurisdiction globally to formally regulate 6PPD-quinone (toxic to aquatic species); Ministerial Order 2024 under CEPA prohibits use of 6PPD in tyres for passenger vehicles; compliance timelines being set
notes: WORLD FIRST: Canada 6PPD ban 2024; forces global reformulation; watch DTSC CA alignment

regulation_name: Provincial Tyre Stewardship Programs (Ontario OTS + Quebec RST)
regulation_ref: Ontario Tires Regulation O.Reg.84/03 (RPRA) + Quebec Regulation RRQ c.Q-2 r.13
key_requirements: Each province has producer responsibility for tyre waste; Ontario: RPRA tyre registry, approved collection programs; Quebec: eco-levy on tyre imports; BC/AB/MB/SK similar provincial schemes
notes: All 10 provinces have some form of tyre stewardship; RPRA Ontario most structured; eco-levy ~1-4 CAD/tyre

regulation_name: NOM-086-SCT-2-2017 — Passenger Car Tyre Safety Standards
enforcement_body: SCT (Secretaria de Comunicaciones y Transportes) + Profeco
key_requirements: Mandatory tyre safety standard for passenger car tyres; conformity certification via accredited labs; NOM mark required; dimensional and performance standards based on FMVSS/ISO
notes: NOM certification required before import clearance; lab testing mandatory; updated 2017 replacing NOM-086-SCT-2-2000

regulation_ref: INMETRO Portaria n.482 de 18 novembro 2010 (as updated)
enforcement_body: INMETRO (National Institute of Metrology Standardization and Industrial Quality)
key_requirements: Mandatory third-party certification for pneumatic tyres (PBPNEU program); INMETRO mark required; type testing at accredited INMETRO labs; annual factory audit; scope includes passenger car tyres imported and domestically produced
notes: PBPNEU = Programa Brasileiro de Pneumaticos; INMETRO mark on sidewall mandatory; updated Portaria 2020

enforcement_body: IBAMA + CONAMA (Conselho Nacional do Meio Ambiente)
key_requirements: Manufacturers and importers of tyres responsible for collection and disposal of equivalent number of used tyres; national collection network; Reciclanip as industry scheme; ban on open burning
notes: Reciclanip collects >4M tonnes since 2000; 1:1 collection ratio for new tyre importers

regulation_name: Resolucion 56/2011 SCM + INTI Testing — Homologacion neumaticos
regulation_ref: Resolucion 56/2011 de la Secretaria de Comercio Interior + INTI
enforcement_body: INTI (Instituto Nacional de Tecnologia Industrial) + Secretaria de Comercio
key_requirements: Mandatory homologation of tyres before commercialization; INTI testing per IRAM/ISO standards; certification mark required; importer responsible for compliance; IRAM 113017 passenger car tyre standard
notes: INTI homologation certificate required for customs; updated 2022 resolution expanding scope

enforcement_body: INN (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacion) + SII + SEREMI
key_requirements: National tyre standard NCh 1949 for passenger car tyres; type testing required; SERNAC consumer protection applicable; no mandatory certification but customs declaration required
notes: NCh 1949 based on ISO/ETRTO; voluntary unless referenced in procurement; no specific REP law

regulation_ref: Resolucion 1457 de 2010 (Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible)
enforcement_body: Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible + ANDI
key_requirements: Extended producer responsibility for waste tyres; producers and importers must implement collection/disposal programs; RUEDA (Colombian waste tyre scheme) as collective system; annual reporting to MADS
notes: RUEDA y Recicaucho as collective systems; ~4M waste tyres/year; CO EPR tyre law among first in LATAM

regulation_name: GMC Resolution 22/12 — Tyres Common Technical Regulation
enforcement_body: Grupo Mercado Comun (GMC) + national standards bodies
key_requirements: Common MERCOSUR technical regulation for pneumatic tyres; harmonizes safety requirements across BR/AR/PY/UY; mutual recognition of national certifications; INMETRO Brazil as reference lab
notes: MERCOSUR reglamento tecnico armonizado; reduces duplicate testing; AR and BR primary markets

regulation_name: CCC Mark for Tyres — China Compulsory Certification
key_requirements: Mandatory CCC (3C) certification for passenger car tyres sold in China; type testing at CNCA-accredited labs (CATARC, Intertek CN); annual factory inspection; CCC mark on sidewall or label
notes: CCC required for import customs clearance; CNCA-C11-01 scope: GB 9743 passenger tyres; 6-12 months lead time

regulation_name: GB 9743 — Chinese National Standard for Passenger Car Tyres
key_requirements: Mandatory national standard: dimensional classification, load/speed indices, endurance test, high-speed test, plunger test; aligns with ECE R30 and ETRTO dimensional tables
notes: GB 9743:2015 references ISO standards; mandatory via CCC scheme; update expected GB 9743:2024+

regulation_name: GB 30510 — China Tyre Labelling (RR + Wet Grip + Noise)
enforcement_body: SAC + MIIT (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology)
key_requirements: Mandatory tyre energy label for fuel efficiency (A-E), wet grip (A-E), rolling noise class; applies to tyres for passenger cars; label at point-of-sale; self-declaration with testing at accredited lab
notes: GB 30510:2021 mandatory Jan 2023; similar to EU 2020/740 but different grading thresholds

regulation_name: China Waste Tyre Comprehensive Utilization Standards
regulation_ref: MOE/MIIT Guiding Catalogue for Comprehensive Utilization of Waste Tyres (2021)
enforcement_body: MIIT + Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE)
key_requirements: Guidelines for waste tyre recycling (crumb rubber, pyrolysis, retreading); no formal producer responsibility law yet; 14th Five-Year Plan targets for tyre recycling rates
notes: CN largest waste tyre generator globally; formal EPR law under development; crumb rubber major use

regulation_name: Road Traffic Ordinance Cap.374A — Tyre Construction Requirements
regulation_ref: Road Traffic (Construction and Maintenance of Vehicles) Regulations CAP 374A
key_requirements: Tyres must meet construction and maintenance standards for vehicle use; ECE R30/R117 recognized; type approval via international certificates accepted; no separate HK tyre certification
notes: HK market follows UK/international standards; ECE E-mark accepted; no HK-specific tyre law

regulation_name: CNS 4517 + BSMI Commodity Inspection Mark — Taiwan Tyre Standard
regulation_ref: CNS 4517 (Chinese National Standard for Passenger Car Tyres) + Commodity Inspection Act
enforcement_body: BSMI (Bureau of Standards Metrology and Inspection) + MOTC
key_requirements: Mandatory BSMI commodity inspection for imported passenger car tyres; CNS 4517 technical standard; batch inspection or type approval route; BSMI mark required on label or packaging
notes: BSMI mandatory inspection: Declaration of Conformity (DoC) or batch inspection; CNS 4517 aligned ISO/ETRTO

regulation_name: Road Vehicle Act + JATMA Standards + JIS D 4202
regulation_ref: Road Vehicle Act (Doro Unso Sharyo Ho) + JATMA Year Book + JIS D 4202
enforcement_body: MLIT (Ministry of Land Infrastructure Transport and Tourism) + JATMA
key_requirements: Tyres for passenger cars must comply with Road Vehicle Act security standards; JIS D 4202 dimensional standard; JATMA Year Book defines load/speed tables; self-declaration required
notes: JATMA = Japan Automobile Tyre Manufacturers Association; JIS D 4202 mandatory reference; self-cert

regulation_name: Japan Recycling Law — Used Tyre Management
regulation_ref: Act for Promotion of Effective Utilization of Resources + Used Tyre Processing
enforcement_body: Ministry of the Environment (MOE Japan) + JATMA
key_requirements: Voluntary industry-led used tyre recycling via JATMA tire recycle scheme; >99% recycling rate in Japan; no formal EPR law but JATMA voluntary commitments replace legislation
notes: JP relies on JATMA voluntary system; thermal energy recovery (TDF) dominant; very high recycling rate

regulation_name: KMVSS — Korean Motor Vehicle Safety Standards + KS M 6750
regulation_ref: Korean Motor Vehicle Safety Standards + KS M 6750
enforcement_body: MOLIT (Ministry of Land Infrastructure and Transport) + KOTSA
key_requirements: KMVSS mandates performance standards for passenger car tyres; KS M 6750 national tyre standard; self-certification with test report from accredited lab; KOTSA random market surveillance
notes: KOTSA (Korea Transportation Safety Authority) conducts recall and market surveillance; KS M 6750 referenced KMVSS

regulation_name: KOTSA — Korea Automobile Testing and Research Institute Approval
key_requirements: Mandatory type approval testing at KOTSA/KATRI for new tyre models; tyre registration before commercialization; annual production audit; recall coordination authority
notes: KOTSA = both testing lab and enforcement; mandatory registration for each new tyre model entering KR market

regulation_name: LTA Singapore Vehicle Type Approval + ECE-Aligned Tyre Standards
regulation_ref: Road Traffic (Motor Vehicles Construction and Use) Rules + LTA Vehicle Type Approval
key_requirements: Passenger car tyres require compliance with LTA Vehicle Type Approval; ECE R30 and R117 accepted; E-mark recognized; LTA type approval for new tyre models before vehicle registration
notes: SG accepts ECE E-mark; LTA approval process uses ECE framework; small market, strict enforcement

regulation_name: Malaysian Standards MS 224 + Road Transport Department — Tyre Safety
regulation_ref: MS 224 (Malaysian Standard for Passenger Car Tyres) + Road Transport Act 1987
enforcement_body: SIRIM (Standards and Industrial Research Institute Malaysia) + JPJ (Road Transport Department)
key_requirements: MS 224 national standard aligned with ISO; SIRIM certification for imported tyres; JPJ enforces road safety standards; ECE mark generally accepted as equivalence
notes: SIRIM voluntary certification used for customs; no formal CCC equivalent; ECE R30 accepted by JPJ

regulation_name: TISI 36 — Thailand Industrial Standard for Passenger Car Tyres
enforcement_body: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute) + Ministry of Industry
key_requirements: Mandatory TISI compulsory certification for passenger car tyres (TIS 36); type testing at TISI-accredited labs; TISI mark on tyre sidewall; annual factory audit; customs clearance requires TISI certificate
notes: TIS 36 compulsory for import/sale in TH; TISI lab testing required; update to TIS 36-2558 ongoing

regulation_name: QCVN 34:2017/BGTVT — Vietnamese National Technical Regulation on Tyres
enforcement_body: MOT (Bo Giao thong van tai) + Vietnam Register
key_requirements: Mandatory national technical regulation for passenger car tyres; conformity certification required; testing at Vietnam Register accredited labs; type approval before import; aligned with ECE R30 principles
notes: QCVN 34:2017 mandatory; VR (Vietnam Register) issues conformity certificate; importers register each model

regulation_name: SNI 0098:2012 — Indonesian National Standard for Tyre Safety
regulation_ref: SNI 0098:2012 (Standar Nasional Indonesia for Tyres) — Compulsory
key_requirements: Mandatory SNI certification for passenger car tyres imported or produced domestically; type testing at LSPro-accredited laboratories; SNI mark on sidewall; annual factory audit by KEMENPERIN
notes: SNI 0098:2012 compulsory by Permenperin; covers PCR passenger car radial tyres; customs holds without SNI cert

regulation_name: PNS DTI BPS — Philippine National Standard for Tyres
regulation_ref: PNS/DTI BPS — Tyre Standards + Bureau of Philippine Standards
enforcement_body: DTI-BPS (Bureau of Philippine Standards) + LTO (Land Transportation Office)
key_requirements: Philippine National Standard for tyres administered by DTI-BPS; Philippine Standard (PS) mark for conformity; LTO enforces road safety; ISO/ECE standards referenced in PNS
notes: DTI-BPS mandatory certification limited; LTO roadworthiness enforces tyre condition; market largely ECE-mark accepts

regulation_name: BIS IS 15633 + AIS 044 — India Mandatory Tyre Certification
regulation_ref: BIS IS 15633:2019 (Passenger Car Tyres) + AIS 044 Rev.1
enforcement_body: BIS (Bureau of Indian Standards) + MoRTH (Ministry of Road Transport and Highways)
key_requirements: Mandatory BIS certification for passenger car tyres under IS 15633; BIS mark (ISI mark) required; AIS 044 rev.1 specifies detailed test requirements for automotive tyres; accredited BIS labs testing
notes: Quality Control Order (QCO) mandates BIS IS 15633 for domestic and imported tyres; BIS Registration required

regulation_name: MoRTH Notification — Mandatory Tyre Performance Standard 2022
enforcement_body: MoRTH + ARAI (Automotive Research Association of India)
key_requirements: Mandatory rolling resistance, wet grip, and external rolling noise standards for tyres sold in India; aligns with ECE R117 framework; ARAI or NATRIP testing mandatory; phased compliance for PCR tyres
notes: India first developing economy to mandate RRC+wet grip+noise; phase 2 labelling under development; ARAI mandatory testing

regulation_name: ADR 23/04 — Australian Design Rule for Passenger Car Tyres
enforcement_body: DITRDCA (Dept. of Infrastructure Transport Regional Development) + ACCC
key_requirements: Mandatory ADR type approval for passenger car tyres; ADR 23/04 adopts ECE R30 as equivalent standard; E-mark (ECE R30) accepted as proof of conformity; tyre markings per ECE requirements
notes: ADR 23/04 = direct ECE R30 equivalence; E-mark sufficient for compliance; ACCC monitors market

regulation_name: AU ECE R30 Acceptance + UN-ECE 1958 Convention
regulation_ref: UN-ECE 1958 Geneva Agreement — Australia Contracting Party
key_requirements: Australia contracting party to 1958 Geneva Agreement; E-mark (ECE R30) accepted without separate AU testing; ADR 23/04 harmonized; simplifies import pathway for ECE-certified tyres
notes: AU acceptance of 1958 Agreement streamlines ECE-certified tyre imports; no separate AU type approval needed

regulation_name: Land Transport Rule: Tyres and Wheels 2001
regulation_ref: Land Transport Rule: Tyres and Wheels 2001 (Rule 32013)
enforcement_body: NZTA (New Zealand Transport Agency — Waka Kotahi)
key_requirements: Mandatory tyre standards for road use; tyres must meet performance requirements equivalent to ECE R30; minimum tread depth 1.5mm; NZTA WoF (Warrant of Fitness) inspects tyres; retreaded tyres restricted
notes: Rule 32013 references ECE R30 as acceptable standard; NZTA WoF includes tyre condition check; import must meet rule

regulation_name: ASEAN Vehicle MRA — Mutual Recognition Arrangement for ECE Standards
regulation_ref: ASEAN Sectoral MRA for Automotive Products (ASEAN-MRAVAP) + WP.29 alignment
key_requirements: ASEAN MRA for automotive products including tyres; ECE R30 and R117 recognized across ASEAN members; reduces duplicate testing; Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia primary signatories
notes: ASEAN MRA reduces trade barriers; ECE-aligned standards adopted by TH/MY/ID/SG/VN; harmonization ongoing

regulation_name: GSO 1457 — GCC Standard for Passenger Car Tyres
regulation_ref: GSO 1457:2006 (Gulf Standard Organization — Tyres for Passenger Cars)
enforcement_body: GSO (Gulf Standards Organization) + National conformity bodies (SASO, ESMA, QSMO, BSB, KSAA, OCS)
key_requirements: Mandatory GSO 1457 certification for passenger car tyres in all GCC states; type testing at GSO-accredited labs; GMARK (GCC conformity mark) required; aligned with ECE R30 and ISO
notes: GMARK mandatory for import into Saudi/UAE/Qatar/Kuwait/Bahrain/Oman; Saudi SASO most stringent enforcement

regulation_name: SASO 2856 — Saudi Tyre Fuel Efficiency Labelling
regulation_ref: SASO 2856:2017 (Saudi Standards Metrology and Quality Organization)
enforcement_body: SASO (Saudi Standards Metrology and Quality Organization)
key_requirements: Mandatory tyre fuel efficiency labelling for passenger car tyres in Saudi Arabia; A-E grading for rolling resistance; wet grip grades; noise class; SASO 2856 aligns with EU 2020/740 and UN GTR framework
notes: SASO 2856 mandatory Saudi; first MENA country with mandatory tyre label; UAE/Qatar may follow

regulation_name: SI 5247 — Israeli Standard for Tyre Safety
regulation_ref: SI 5247 (Standards Institution of Israel — Pneumatic Tyres for Passenger Cars)
enforcement_body: SII (Standards Institution of Israel) + MOT (Ministry of Transport Israel)
key_requirements: Israeli tyre standard SI 5247 mandates conformity for passenger car tyres; ECE R30 recognized as equivalent; mandatory certification via SII or recognized international body; marking requirements
notes: SI 5247 based on ISO/ECE; SII mandatory marking; E-mark generally accepted; MOT vehicle roadworthiness

regulation_name: ES 4068 — Egyptian Standard for Passenger Car Tyres
regulation_ref: EOS ES 4068 (Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality Control)
key_requirements: Mandatory ES 4068 certification for passenger car tyres imported to Egypt; GOEIC enforces at port; type testing at ETSP or accredited labs
notes: EOS ES 4068 based on ISO/ECE; GOEIC mandatory inspection certificate; ECE E-mark simplifies process

regulation_name: NM 22.1.301 — Moroccan Standard for Pneumatic Tyres
regulation_ref: NM 22.1.301 (Norme Marocaine — Institut Marocain de Normalisation IMANOR)
enforcement_body: IMANOR + Ministere de l'Industrie et du Commerce
key_requirements: Moroccan national standard for pneumatic tyres; mandatory Moroccan mark (NM) for commercial sale; testing at IMANOR-accredited labs; ECE R30 recognized as equivalence basis; EU Association Agreement simplifies imports
notes: NM 22.1.301 referenced in import regs; IMANOR certification; EU AA facilitates EU-certified tyre import

regulation_name: SANS 2027 + NRCS Compulsory Specification for Passenger Car Tyres
enforcement_body: NRCS (National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications) + SABS
key_requirements: Mandatory NRCS Letters of Authority (LoA) for passenger car tyres; VC 9008 compulsory specification based on SANS 2027/ECE R30; NRCS mark required on label; testing at SABS or accredited labs
notes: NRCS LoA required before import/sale; VC 9008 compulsory; SABS testing; E-mark simplifies pathway

regulation_name: SON NIS 110 — Nigerian Industrial Standard for Tyres
regulation_ref: SON NIS 110 (Standards Organisation of Nigeria) — Mandatory Standard
key_requirements: Mandatory SON certification for passenger car tyres imported to Nigeria; NIS 110 standard; conformity assessment via MANCAP or SONCAP scheme; SON mark required
notes: SONCAP mandatory for pre-shipment inspection; NIS 110 based on ISO/ECE; SON Lagos port enforcement

regulation_name: KEBS PVoC + KS 1019 — Kenya Tyre Standard and Pre-Export Verification
regulation_ref: KS 1019 (Kenya Standard for Pneumatic Tyres) + KEBS PVoC Scheme
key_requirements: Mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) for passenger car tyres exported to Kenya; KS 1019 technical standard based on ISO/ECE; KEBS Diamond Mark required; third-party PVoC agents (SGS, Bureau Veritas, Intertek) in origin country
notes: PVoC at origin mandatory; KEBS Diamond Mark; KS 1019 ref ECE R30; BV/SGS/Intertek as PVoC agents

regulation_name: UNECE WP.29 — World Forum for Harmonization of Vehicle Regulations (Tyre Framework)
regulation_ref: UNECE WP.29 — Working Party on General Safety Provisions (GRSG) + GRRF
enforcement_body: UNECE WP.29 (hosted by UNECE Geneva) — Contracting Parties 1958/1998 Agreements
key_requirements: UNECE WP.29 mother body for all vehicle/tyre regulations; manages ECE R30, R117, R109; 1958 Agreement framework for type approval; Working Party GRVA/GRSG/GRRF develops tyre regulations; currently developing GTR for tyres
notes: WP.29 = overarching governance; sessions 3x/year Geneva; 60+ contracting parties; GTR framework expanding

regulation_name: 1958 Geneva Agreement — ECE Type Approval Mutual Recognition
regulation_ref: UNECE 1958 Agreement (Adoption of Harmonized Technical UN Regulations for Wheeled Vehicles)
key_requirements: Mutual recognition of type approvals between 58 contracting parties; E-mark on tyres certifies compliance with ECE regulations (R30/R117/R109); reduces duplicate national testing; foundation of global tyre trade
notes: 1958 Agreement covers EU, RU, JP, AU, ZA, KR and 50+ others; E-mark globally recognized; US/CA not signatory

regulation_name: 1998 Agreement — Global Technical Regulations (GTR) for Tyres
regulation_ref: UNECE 1998 Agreement (Establishing of Global Technical Regulations for Wheeled Vehicles)
enforcement_body: UNECE WP.29 + Contracting Parties (inc. US, CA, CN, JP, EU)
key_requirements: GTR framework includes GTR No. 16 (tyres) covering rolling resistance; GTR development enables US, CA, CN, JP, EU to converge standards without mandatory adoption; reference basis for developing countries
notes: GTR No.16 (Global Rolling Resistance GTR); US and CA contracting parties to 1998 Agreement

regulation_name: ISO 28580 — Rolling Resistance Test Method (RRC for Tyre Labelling)
